priority_basis: The canonical queue has no active frontier_research item. R-025 left browser compatibility unresolved, and its committed source contains a concrete unsupported-options fallback gap for strict durability.
action: Add a capability-negotiated IndexedDB transaction helper that preserves atomicity without masking non-capability errors or overstating durability.
sources_inspected: W3C Indexed Database API 3.0 Editor's Draft
finding: Unsupported transaction options should fall back only on TypeError, regardless of valid requested durability. InvalidStateError and other lifecycle failures must remain visible. Requested or observed durability is not persistence proof.
handoff: Integrate openCapabilityNegotiatedTransaction into indexeddb-acceptance-ledger.mjs, then run real-browser two-tab and bfcache tests across Safari, Chromium, and Firefox. Record options support separately from persistence evidence.
